ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "attrition" TEXT /* Indicates if the employee has left the company (Yes/No) */,
  "business_travel" TEXT /* Frequency of business travel (e.g. Travel_Rarely, Travel_Frequently, Non-Travel) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the employee works */,
  "distance_from_home" INTEGER /* Distance from home to the workplace (in miles) */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Education level of the employee */,
  "education_field" TEXT /* Field of education (e.g. Life Sciences, Medical) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "job_level" INTEGER /* Job level (e.g. 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "job_role" TEXT /* Job role of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "monthly_income" REAL /* Monthly income of the employee */,
  "num_companies_worked" INTEGER /* Number of companies the employee has worked for */,
  "over_18" TEXT /* Indicates if the employee is over 18 years old (Y/N) */,
  "percent_salary_hike" INTEGER /* Percentage increase in salary in the last appraisal */,
  "standard_hours" INTEGER /* Standard working hours per week */,
  "stock_option_level" INTEGER /* Level of stock options available to the employee */,
  "total_working_years" INTEGER /* Total years of working experience */,
  "training_times_last_year" INTEGER /* Number of training sessions attended in the last year */,
  "years_at_company" INTEGER /* Years the employee has worked at the current company */,
  "years_since_last_promotion" INTEGER /* Years since the employee's last promotion */,
  "years_with_curr_manager" INTEGER /* Years the employee has worked with their current manager */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "date_of_last_promotion" TEXT /* Date of the last promotion */,
  "last_performance_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last performance review */,
  "last_salary_hike_date" TEXT /* Date of the last salary hike */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Current status of the employee (e.g., Active, On Leave, Terminated) */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the emergency contact to the employee */,
  "benefit_eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility status for benefits (e.g., Health Insurance, Retirement Plan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_role FOREIGN KEY ("job_role") REFERENCES job_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  "department_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "department_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  "department_headcount" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "education_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the job role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the job role */,
  "role_responsibilities" TEXT /* Primary responsibilities of the job role */,
  "role_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for the job role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attrition_analysis" (
  "attrition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department analyzed */,
  "total_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees in the department */,
  "attrition_rate" REAL /* Calculated attrition rate for the department */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of employees in the department */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average monthly income of employees in the department */,
  "average_years_at_company" REAL /* Average years the employees have worked at the company in the department */,
  "average_training_sessions" REAL /* Average number of training sessions attended by employees in the department */,
  "average_salary_hike" REAL /* Average salary hike for employees in the department */,
  "average_distance_from_home" REAL /* Average distance from home to the workplace for employees in the department */,
  "average_num_companies_worked" REAL /* Average number of companies worked for by employees in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attrition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attrition_analysis_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given during the review (scale of 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided in the review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_department" TEXT /* Department of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the training session */,
  "duration_hours" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in hours */,
  "training_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the training session */,
  "training_location" TEXT /* Location where the training session is held */,
  "training_instructor" TEXT /* Name of the training instructor */,
  "training_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants for the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who attended the training */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session attended */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of completion (e.g. Completed, Not Completed) */,
  "date_of_completion" TEXT /* Date when the training session was completed */,
  "certificate_issued" TEXT /* Indicates if a certificate was issued (Yes/No) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the employee about the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., HR Manager, Data Analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user role */,
  "role_department" TEXT /* Department associated with the role */,
  "role_email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., View, Edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_device" TEXT /* Device used by the user to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
